allow: PowerShell($p = Get-Content src/data/productos.json | ConvertFrom-Json; "Total: $\($p.Count\)"; $p | Group-Object categoria | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Name\): $\($_.Count\)" }; "Sin slug: $\(\($p | Where-Object { -not $_.slug }\).Count\)"; "Ids únicos: $\(\($p.id | Select-Object -Unique\).Count\)"; "Slugs únicos: $\(\($p.slug | Select-Object -Unique\).Count\)"; "Con personalización: $\(\($p | Where-Object { $_.personalizacion }\).Count\)")
